features.description: Master feature key. Off = the whole module is invisible: no admin surfaces, no evidence submission workflow, no rate report. Chargebacks still record in the DB (bank-forced writes cannot be suppressed) but no tenant-facing UI renders them.
Enables the evidence submission workflow. Small tier defaults on — without it, all chargebacks auto-lose on deadline (evidence never submitted -> expired).
Enables the RDR auto-refund path — Visa-only. Auto-refund below the configured threshold to close pre-chargeback state. No network fee. No rate impact. Medium+ tier.

Enables the CE3.0 evidence builder for eligible Visa fraud chargebacks. Assembles two prior legitimate purchases + matching IP + device fingerprint alongside standard evidence. Dramatically higher win rates for eligible disputes. Medium+ tier.
Enables the rate tracker + VDMP/MDMP threshold alerts. Rolling 60-day rate per network monitored nightly. Default ON — merchant-account risk visibility is business-critical.
Enterprise-only. Extends retention 7y -> 10y for financial audit alignment.
Enables the rich rate + reason + provider distribution reports. Small tier gets a basic rate-only report; Medium+ adds full distribution + RDR/CE3 metrics + win rate + median days to decision.

Enables the tenant.{id}.chargebacks broadcast channel + opt-in real-time chargeback notifications. Useful for tenants with high chargeback velocity who want live visibility into evidence queues + rate alerts.
